title: Norwegian Energizing Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry filled with the flavors of Norway, using rich and tender ingredients.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the onion is translucent.
Add the green beans and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until they begin to soften.
Add the canned tomatoes and stir-fry for 1 minute, breaking up any large pieces with a spoon.
Stir in the brown rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until it is lightly toasted.
Crumble the feta cheese over the top and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the mixture is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
